\tzpentry{ID5140}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5140 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\\box^{\\mathrm{t}}\\phi= g^{ab}\\nabla^{\\mathrm{t}}\\_{a}\\nabla^{\\mathrm{t}}\\_{b}\\phi\\)
\]
